stemHtml: What is the reason that DME utilises pulse pairs instead of single pulses?

options.a: To increase the number of aircraft that can simultaneously use the DME station to determine the DME range.
options.b: To increase the accuracy and reliability of the range measurement.
options.c: To be able to use a separate interrogation and reply frequency, and thus to increase the number of DME stations that can transmit in the same part of the DME frequency band.
options.d: To distinguish DME transmissions from transmissions of other (radar) systems utilising single pulses.
